title: A Matter of TASTE: Improving Coverage and Difficulty of Agent Benchmarks
acquisition_purpose: Primary-source and official-release acquisition for queued review-taste-tool-sequence-task-generation-validity; this record does not claim a deep review.

paper.withdrawal_status: The immutable v2 API summary contains no withdrawal or retraction notice.
paper.extraction_status: The full immutable 41-page v2 PDF extracted successfully with no NUL or Unicode replacement characters. Title/abstract, three-stage method, experimental setup/results, implementation appendix, prompts/checklist, and final physical page were sampled for continuity.

official_release.paper_link_evidence: The immutable PDF footnote links this repository and says the TASTE code and tau-c-Bench data are available there.
official_release.paper_release_timing: The pinned commit is 3 days 23:05:27 after initial v1 publication and 1 day 20:29:33 before immutable v2. It is the exact commit specified by the queue, but review must still test paper-release correspondence rather than assume identity.
official_release.license: Custom all-rights-reserved review/reproducibility-only notice (GitHub reports NOASSERTION/Other). It prohibits redistribution, sublicensing, publication, derivatives, and commercial use until replaced; local reading/building/reproduction are permitted.
official_release.archive_tracking: Retained locally and explicitly excluded through .git/info/exclude; it must not be committed, pushed, or redistributed under the pinned license.
official_release.metadata_tracking: The raw GitHub commit response contains patches and the tree response inventories restricted files; both are retained locally and excluded from Git tracking with the archive.
official_release.release_inventory_check: The archive contains 42 Python, 37 JSON, 13 text, four Markdown, and one TOML file, including three domain packs, n-gram checkpoints, prompts, validated cluster medoids, seven task-set files, and pipeline code. README, LICENSE, pyproject.toml, archive integrity, and representative paths were inspected without executing code or paid APIs.
official_release.release_status: The exact queued commit is locally hash-pinned and readable. Its restricted license is preserved; no repository content is redistributed. Detailed artifact correspondence and end-to-end chain reconstruction remain review work.
official_release.correspondence_boundary: Acquisition verifies repository identity from the PDF link, exact commit/archive identity, restrictive license, archive readability, and basic inventory only. It does not validate seed provenance, LLM labels, coverage estimands, task solvability, verifier soundness, evolution, results, or transport beyond these domains.

claim_boundary: This acquisition establishes local, hash-pinned paper and restricted exact-release evidence only. It is not a deep review and does not validate task validity, semantic workflow coverage, difficulty, saturation, accepted alternatives, capability, professional realism, production fitness, safety, or readiness.
